item.title: Billionaire backer sues Trump family's crypto firm over alleged extortion
item.description: Billionaire investor Justin Sun is suing the family's World Liberty crypto venture after spending $45m on its tokens.

item.title: EU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine as pipeline is turned on ending deadlock
item.description: Ukraine says it has reopened the Druzhba pipeline, after months of stalemate over stalled oil supplies to neighbouring Hungary.

item.title: Nigeria's suspected coup plotters deny treason charges
item.description: Allegations of a coup plot first surfaced last year when an Independence Day parade was cancelled.

item.title: Pope Leo criticises Equatorial Guinea prisons as he winds up Africa tour
item.description: The Pope gives a frank and passionate speech, the likes of which have characterised his tour of Africa.

item.title: US and Iran in blockade standoff as Pakistan pushes for talks
item.description: The mood in the Strait of Hormuz remains combustible despite Trump's ceasefire extension.
